🎤 Lyrics:Billy Joel - Piano Man 

[Verse 1]
It's nine o'clock on a Saturday
The regular crowd shuffles in
There's an old man sittin' next to me
Makin' love to his tonic and gin
He says, "Son, can you play me a memory?
I'm not really sure how it goes
But it's sad, and it's sweet, and I knew it complete
When I wore a younger man's clothes"

[Refrain]
La, la-la, di-dee-da
La-la, di-dee-da da-dum

[Chorus]
Sing us a song, you're the piano man
Sing us a song tonight
Well, we're all in the mood for a melody
And you've got us feelin' alright

[Verse 2]
Now John at the bar is a friend of mine
He gets me my drinks for free
And he's quick with a joke, or to light up your smoke
But there's someplace that he'd rather be
He says, "Bill, I believe this is killing me"
As the smile ran away from his face
"Well, I'm sure that I could be a movie star
If I could get out of this place"

[Refrain]
Oh, la, la-la, di-dee-da
La-la, di-dee-da da-dum

[Verse 3]
Now Paul is a real estate novelist
Who never had time for a wife
And he's talkin' with Davy, who's still in the navy
And probably will be for life
And the waitress is practicing politics
As the businessmen slowly get stoned
Yes, they're sharing a drink they call loneliness
But it's better than drinkin' alone

[Piano Solo]

[Chorus]
Sing us a song, you're the piano man
Sing us a song tonight
Well, we're all in the mood for a melody
And you've got us feelin' alright

[Verse 4]
It's a pretty good crowd for a Saturday
And the manager gives me a smile
'Cause he knows that it's me they've been comin' to see
To forget about life for a while
And the piano, it sounds like a carnival
And the microphone smells like a beer
And they sit at the bar and put bread in my jar
And say, "Man, what are you doin' here?"

[Refrain]
Oh, la, la-la, di-dee-da
La-la, di-dee-da da-dum

[Chorus]
Sing us a song, you're the piano man
Sing us a song tonight
Well, we're all in the mood for a melody
And you've got us feelin' alright

.........

snippet.title: DEATH AWAITS | Marathon Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny.  

Marathon releases March 5, 2026.  

Play Marathon in the Server Slam weekend from February 26, 2026 to March 2, 2026. This open preview weekend* is available worldwide on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save.

Learn more: https://www.bungie.net/7/en/News/Article/marathon-server-slam

Pre-order Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

snippet.title: Life | Sheera Jasvir (4k Official Video) New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026 | New Song
snippet.description:
Life” is a powerful Punjabi track about living and working in foreign countries, the struggles, long shifts, tuition stress, missing family, and the nonstop grind to build a better future. This song represents everyone who works hard away from home, staying strong through tough times and never giving up.

The lyrics capture the reality behind the dream, early mornings, late nights, empty pockets, and big responsibilities. It reflects the mindset of people who leave their comfort zone to create something bigger for themselves and their families.

With emotional vibes and meaningful words, “Life” connects to anyone who understands sacrifice, ambition, and the true meaning of hustle. If you relate to the grind, this one’s for you.

Singer Composer - Sheera Jasvir

snippet.title: THE MANDALORIAN AND GROGU (2026) | Official Trailer REACTION!
snippet.description:
This is our full THE MANDALORIAN AND GROGU (2026) | Official Trailer REACTION! and it’s safe to say Star Wars fans have a LOT to talk about. Kristian Harloff reacting to the brand-new footage and breaking down what this trailer reveals about the future of Din Djarin, Grogu, and the Star Wars universe as they head to the big screen.

In this reaction, we dive deep into the mandalorian and grogu trailer, analyzing story hints, visuals, and major moments that stood out on a first watch. From classic Star Wars vibes to the emotional beats surrounding Grogu (yes, Baby Yoda), this the mandalorian and grogu (2026) | official trailer reaction! delivers plenty for fans to speculate on.

We also talk about how the mandalorian and grogu official trailer connects to the larger Star Wars timeline, what this means for the franchise post-Disney+ era, and how Pedro Pascal continues to define the Mandalorian. Whether you’re here for a full star wars trailer reaction, a classic mandalorian reaction, or just want to see honest first impressions, this trailer reaction has you covered.
